case_title: WALDMAN, DAN vs. BROOKER, ALLYSON et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BROOKER, ALLYSON
#1 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. HEARING ON TERMS OF STIPULATION UNDER SUBMISSION.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKER, ALLYSON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALDMAN, DAN AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKER, ALLYSON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR HEARING OF MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE APPLICATION IS GRANTED AND DEFT'S MOTION SHALL BE HEARD ON TUESDAY, 07-SEP-93 AT 9:00AM.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 01, MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL, CALENDAR OF SEP-07-1993, OFF CALENDAR CASE SETTLED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALDMAN, DAN COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $80.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALDMAN, DAN

#1 JUDGE WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G VAN HEST. C/C FOR CT TRIAL.ALL PARTIES PRESENT WITH COUNSEL. STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO HAVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2809 AND 2811 POLK ST, BLOCK 478, LOT 4. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. NOTICE MAY BE POSTED BUT EXECUTION STAYED THRU 9/21/93. PLTF WAIVES RENT, DAMAGES, COSTS & ATTY FEES. DEFT'S PERSONAL POSSESSION TO BE MOVED WITHIN 48 HRS TO A BEDROOM ON LOWER FLOOR, FOR STORAGE ONLY NOT OCCUPANCY. IN ADDITION PLTF WILL PAY DEFT A TOTAL OF $5,000.00 OF WHICH $2,500.00 ON 9/15/93 NO LATER THAN 5PM, THE BALANCE ON 9/21/93. MONIES TO BE PAID TO MR. NEBEL. PLTF TO PREPARE STIPULATED JUDGMENT AND MAIL FOR APPROVAL TO ATTY NEBEL IN, MS. BROOKER'S ABSENCE.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF; DECLARATION OF LINDON LILLY; DECLARATION OF DENNIS C HYDE; FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALDMAN, DAN
MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT BROOKER, ALLYSON HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
DEMAND FOR JURY (UNTIMELY) FILED BY DEFENDANT BROOKER, ALLYSON NOTICE OF UNTIMELY JURY DEMAND MAILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOKER, ALLYSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2809-2811 POLK ST, BLOCK 478, LOT 4, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-21-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, ALL DEFT'S PERSONAL PROPERTU TO BE REMOVED TO LOWER UNIT WITHIN 48 HRS OF SEP 7, 1993, STORAGE ONLY. DEFT TO REMOVE ALL POSSESSIONS NO LATER SEP 21, 1993. PLTF WILL PAY DEFT $5,000.00 AS FOLLOWS; $2,500.00 ON 9-15-93 BALANCE OF $2,500.00 ON 9-21-93. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
